films.title: Christine
films.overview: In 1974, television reporter Christine Chubbuck struggles with depression and professional frustrations as she tries to advance her career.

films.title: Elvis & Nixon
films.overview: In 1970, a few days before Christmas, Elvis Presley showed up on the White House lawn seeking to be deputized into the Bureau of Narcotics and Dangerous Drugs by the President himself.

films.title: Imperium
films.overview: Nate Foster, a young, idealistic FBI agent, goes undercover to take down a radical white supremacy terrorist group. The bright up-and-coming analyst must confront the challenge of sticking to a new identity while maintaining his real principles as he navigates the dangerous underworld of white supremacy. Inspired by real events.

films.title: Wiener-Dog
films.overview: A dachshund passes from oddball owner to oddball owner, whose radically dysfunctional lives are all impacted by the pooch.

films.title: Indignation
films.overview: In 1951, Marcus Messner, a working-class Jewish student from New Jersey, attends a small Ohio college, where he struggles with anti-Semitism, sexual repression, and the ongoing Korean War.

films.title: Lady Bird
films.overview: Lady Bird McPherson, a strong willed, deeply opinionated, artistic 17 year old comes of age in Sacramento. Her relationship with her mother and her upbringing are questioned and tested as she plans to head off to college.

films.title: A House of Dynamite
films.overview: When a single, unattributed missile is launched at the United States, a race begins to determine who is responsible and how to respond.

films.title: The Post
films.overview: A cover-up that spanned four U.S. Presidents pushed the country's first female newspaper publisher and a hard-driving editor to join an unprecedented battle between journalist and government. Inspired by true events.

films.title: Ford v Ferrari
films.overview: American car designer Carroll Shelby and the British-born driver Ken Miles work together to battle corporate interference, the laws of physics, and their own personal demons to build a revolutionary race car for Ford Motor Company and take on the dominating race cars of Enzo Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in France in 1966.

films.title: Deep Water
films.overview: A well-to-do husband who allows his wife to have affairs in order to avoid a divorce becomes a prime suspect in the disappearance of her lovers.

films.title: Little Women
films.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.
